transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks for calling Meridian Health Navigator, this is Ava. How can I help you today?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Hi, I'm wondering if a dermatologist visit is covered under my plan. I have Bright Path Silver PPO.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Sure, I can check that. Can I get your date of birth and member ID to pull up your plan?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Yeah, it's March 3rd, 1987, and the ID is BP44567123.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Got it, thanks. Looking at your plan now... dermatology is covered as a specialist visit, with a forty dollar copay.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Oh good. Do I need a referral from my primary doctor first?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: No referral needed for this plan, you can schedule directly with any in-network dermatologist.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: That's a relief. Is Dr. Ellen Cho at Lakeside Dermatology in-network?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Let me check... yes, Dr. Cho at Lakeside Dermatology is in-network under Bright Path Silver PPO.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Perfect, that's exactly what I needed to know. Thank you.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: You're welcome! Just bring your insurance card to the appointment. Anything else I can help with?
